titles.title: He has chosen you for me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We don't know tomorrow holds But we know who holds tomorrow Knowing this will live above The world and all it sorrows I have prayed for all my life That we would be together Serving Him together seems so right

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, oh yes, it's true He has chosen me for you Take my hand and well agree That he has chosen you for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now and then I like to think About the day He saved me All the love that He bestowed And all the gifts He gave me With all this I praise His name For putting us together We knew we'd be together from the start

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God has saved us Washed us white as snow And now were together Cause He has made it so

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: He has chosen you :/ For me…
